notes: Wild pistachio, site X cultivar Y, selected for HiFi sequencing 2026.

title: Arabidopsis Col-0 HiFi Library
notes: HiFi library prep from Col-0 leaf tissue, passage 30

title: DNA Extracts Box
notes: 96-position tube rack for DNA extracts in active sequencing prep.

title: Pistachio DNA Box
notes: Standard 100-tube cryobox for pistachio genomics project leaf samples and DNA extracts.

title: -80C Freezer A
notes: Primary -80C storage. Holds long-term sample and DNA archives.

title: 4C Fridge (Main)
notes: Standard 4C fridge. Short-term storage for DNA extracts, buffers, media.

title: Asmundson Growth Chamber
notes: Shared plant growth chamber facility, UC Davis Asmundson Hall. Ask the building manager for access.

title: Genome Center
notes: UC Davis Genome Center building. Houses shared sequencing, imaging, and computational resources.

title: Robbins Hall 0170
notes: Primary wet lab space, UC Davis Robbins Hall ground floor.

title: Robbins Hall 262
notes: PI office, UC Davis Robbins Hall 2nd floor. Stores personal reference materials and some lab documentation.

title: Shelf 1
notes: Top shelf of -80C Freezer A. DNA archive boxes.

title: Pistachio Leaf 1
notes: Leaf tissue, flash-frozen in liquid N2 at collection.

title: Pistachio Leaf 2
notes: Backup leaf tissue punch, same tree and collection date.
